name: Urbas Grupo Financiero, S.A.
summary: Urbas Grupo Financiero, S.A. engages in the real estate business in Spain. It develops and sells properties; manages and sells land; and leases properties. The company was formerly known as Urbas Guadahermosa SA. and changed its name to Urbas Grupo Financiero, S.A. in September 2011. Urbas Grupo Financiero, S.A. was founded in 1944 and is based in Guadalajara, Spain.
